Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • cert_compartment_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The compartment ID of the leaf certificate.
  • cert_key_algorithm - (Optional) (Updatable) Key algorithm for issuing the leaf certificate.
  • cert_signature_algorithm - (Optional) (Updatable) Signature algorithm for issuing the leaf certificate.
  • certificate_authority_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The certificate authority ID of the subordinate or intermediate certificate authority.
  • common_name - (Optional) (Updatable) The common name for the leaf certificate.
  • compartment_id - (Required) The OCID of the compartment containing the RoverNode.
  • customer_shipping_address - (Optional) (Updatable) Shipping address information for the RoverNode.
  • data_validation_code - (Optional) (Updatable) Validation code returned by the data validation tool.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags for this resource.
  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) A user-friendly name.
  • enclosure_type - (Optional) (Updatable) The type of enclosure rover node is shipped in.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Simple key-value pair that is applied without any predefined name, type, or scope.
  • import_compartment_id - (Optional) (Updatable) The compartment where data will be imported upon Rover node return.
  • import_file_bucket - (Optional) (Updatable) The bucket where files from the NFS share will be imported upon Rover node return.
  • is_import_requested - (Optional) (Updatable) Indicates whether the customer requests data import upon Rover node return.
  • master_key_id - (Optional) Customer-provided master key ID used to encrypt secret information.
  • node_workloads - (Optional) (Updatable) List of existing workloads that should be provisioned on the node.
  • oracle_shipping_tracking_url - (Optional) (Updatable) Tracking URL for the shipped RoverNode.
  • point_of_contact - (Optional) (Updatable) Name of the point of contact for customer pickup.
  • point_of_contact_phone_number - (Optional) (Updatable) Phone number of the point of contact for customer pickup.
  • public_key - (Optional) (Updatable) The public key of the resource principal.
  • serial_number - (Optional) (Updatable) Serial number of the node.
  • shape - (Optional) (Updatable) The shape of the node.
  • shipping_preference - (Optional) (Updatable) Preference for device delivery.
  • shipping_vendor - (Optional) (Updatable) Shipping vendor of choice for Oracle to customer shipping.
  • super_user_password - (Optional) (Updatable) Root password for the Rover node.
  • system_tags - (Optional) Usage of system tag keys. These predefined keys are scoped to namespaces.
  • time_cert_validity_end - (Optional) (Updatable) The time after which the leaf certificate becomes invalid.
  • time_pickup_expected - (Optional) (Updatable) Expected date when the customer wants to pick up the node.
  • time_return_window_ends - (Optional) (Updatable) End time for the device pickup window.
  • time_return_window_starts - (Optional) (Updatable) Start time for the device pickup window.
  • unlock_passphrase - (Optional) (Updatable) Password used to unlock the Rover node.
